title: SAFFA Invests up to $30 Million in SAF One Project Starting Construction in 2026
content: SAFFA Fund I, managed by Burnham Sterling Asset Management, announced an investment of up to 30 million dollars in a SAF One project that will break ground in 2026 and target sustainable aviation fuel production by Q4 2028. Ten million dollars has already been funded, and the investment may scale as the project progresses and SAF production is offered to the aviation industry. SAF One has been developing a pipeline of SAF projects for several years, achieving key milestones on its Middle East project and preparing for construction in 2026. Leaders from BSAM and SAF One highlighted that scaling SAF requires collaboration across the ecosystem and expressed confidence that the project could become a major SAF supplier for global aviation. SAFFA is backed by eight corporate partners whose combined commitments total approximately 208 million dollars, supporting the acceleration of sustainable aviation fuel production.
author: Analysts Account
